headline: EPAM Systems Targets Biotech Growth As Shares Trade Below Valuation Estimates
summary: EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) presented at the Bio-IT World Conference & Expo 2026, focusing on knowledge engineering and data advisory for biotech and life sciences. The company highlighted its role in helping biotech and healthcare clients manage complex data and IT challenges. This appearance underscores EPAM's efforts to build business beyond its core IT services into healthcare and biotech related work. For investors, this comes after a tough stretch for NYSE:EPAM, with the stock at $102.69...
